chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-48 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on statement 30.01.2019. Mr. Imran Ashraf Panhwar, associate of Mr. Rao Faisal Ali, advocate for the petitioners *** Associate of Mr. Rao Faisal is holding brief on his behalf and not pressing this petition. He has also drawn our attention towards statement dated 01.10.2018, which is to the same effect. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
